title: Cache HTTP Responses with ETag in Go
summary: Cache one JSON HTTP response in Go with an ETag header and 304 Not Modified handling.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers writing JSON bodies with an ETag, returning 304 on matching validators, ignoring non-matching validators, matching wildcard validators, matching one tag in a validator list, rejecting nil inputs, and propagating write errors.
